Tang Qiong е”җз“Ҡ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tang Qiong (е”җз“Ҡ)was born in Danyang commandery. Served as a major in the Wu army. Tang Qiong may not have existed in history. Tang Qiong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
